SHORT NAME: PRVDR_FULL_CCN_NUM 

LONG NAME: PRVDR_FULL_CCN_NUM 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 13 

SOURCE: NCH (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field is the full provider CMS certification number from the first claim record included in the stay.
